data.body: PLAN-REVIEW TRIAGE (verdict PASS; 3 advisories). Accepted: (1) NAME the target doc files in each AC (e.g. README.md MCP-setup section, docs/jira-sync-setup.md) so each 'is documented' AC is a deterministic grep-able check, not unverifiable prose; (2) add an explicit AC covering the verified_at_sha / signs-vs-never-signs documentation deliverable (currently only ref/source semantics is covered). None invalid.
